name: Helix Jump
core_loop: Rotate the helix tower to guide a bouncing ball down through gaps while avoiding colored trap platforms to reach the bottom.
audience_proxy: Broad, casual audience of all ages looking for quick, reflex-based entertainment.
visual_style: 3D minimalist with bright, contrasting colors and simple geometric shapes.

palette.description: Vibrant, high-contrast neon colors against lighter backgrounds to emphasize gameplay elements and danger zones.
